arts.ttl: LIVE: Man City face Brighton and look to avoid fourth straight defeat
arts.sum: Man City boss Pep Guardiola looks to avoid unwanted managerial first in trip to Brighton. ESPN has updates

arts.ttl: 'I hope so' - Pep Guardiola is looking to avoid unwanted managerial record against 'outstanding' Brighton
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola hates losing and he will pull out all the stops to stop a historic fourth consecutive defeat when Manchester City face Brighton.

arts.ttl: Man City eye Atalanta's Ederson - Saturday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester City eye a move for Atalanta midfielder Ederson, Jose Mourinho wants the Newcastle job, Barcelona are set to beat Liverpool to Borussia Dortmund forward Karim Adeyemi.

arts.ttl: Man City teenage goalscoring sensation sends fresh message as excitement builds
arts.sum: Reigan Heskey scored twice as Manchester City Under-18s beat Derby County 5-3 on Saturday

arts.ttl: Why Jeremy Doku is not involved for Man City against Brighton amid injury crisis
arts.sum: Jeremy Doku became the sixth Manchester City player to miss the trip to Brighton when he was a surprise omission from the squad at the Amex Stadium.

arts.ttl: Brighton vs Manchester City: Duo made long-awaited returns; versatile £25m star is surprisingly missing
arts.sum: Joao Pedro and Matt O’Riley are back in the Brighton squad after lengthy injuries – but there is a notable absentee for the visit of Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Brighton vs Man City - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Pep Guardiola's side look to bounce back from defeat to move ahead of title rivals Liverpool
